flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Chattanooga State Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.8% → 0.0%).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Chattanooga State Community College rose 18% between 2021 and 2024 (47.9% → 56.7%).
